title: engine.launchInfo response result
description: Information about the running engine process and its external native window/endpoint, as reported by the engine. The editor backend may already know pid/endpoint from launching the process; this method exposes the engine's own view.

pid.description: Operating-system process id of the engine.

endpoint.description: Optional Bridge WebSocket endpoint the engine is listening on, e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:38080.

executable.description: Optional path or name of the engine executable as the engine reports it.

argv.description: Optional launch arguments as the engine reports them.
